_comment: Source: Screenshot_20260430-225652.png. Thai UI. RapidOCR doesn't ship a Thai model; the 'ch' default garbles Latin digits next to Thai script. The 'en' engine (a Latin-only model) is much more stable on the right-hand damage column even when Thai chars are adjacent, so we route Thai → 'en' as primary. Recommend admins set 'en' as primary OCR language for Thai-speaking alliances.
